2. ____________________ Smelling coffee 3. ____________________ Elevating the eyelids; pupillary constriction 4. ____________________ Slowing the heart; swallowing 5. ____________________ Involved in Bell’s palsy (facial paralysis); crying 6. ____________________ Chewing food; feeling a toothache 7. ____________________ Listening to music; seasickness 8. ____________________ Secretion of saliva; tasting well-seasoned food 9. ____________________ Involved in “rolling” the eyes (three nerves; provide numbers only) 10. ____________________ Swallowing; speaking
